r_tnma_app_trans_group_loanshare_nest.sql: select sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance ,sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount from sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_lon_m_loan_card where (sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no) and (sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0) and (sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = {0}) order by sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type asc

r_tnma_app_trans_group_loangroup_nest.sql:
select sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type ,sum(sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance) as principal_balance ,sum(sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount) as period_payment_amount ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code from sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_lon_m_loan_card ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_edit_group ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where (sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no) and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_edit_group.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_edit_group.member_group_no and (sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0) and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control = {0}
group by sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code order by sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type asc
